# AISearch Global
https://aisearch.global

> AISearch Global is a specialist Answer Engine Optimisation (AEO) and Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO) agency based in Sydney, Australia. We help Australian businesses get found, cited, and recommended inside AI-generated answers on ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, DeepSeek, and Grok.

AISearch Global focuses exclusively on AEO and GEO, not traditional SEO. Our work helps brands move from ranking in blue-link results to being actively recommended by generative AI engines in response to natural language queries.

## Core Services

- [AI Visibility Audit](/services/aeo-audit): A comprehensive baseline audit of how AI engines currently find, describe, and recommend your business. Delivers a prioritised 90-day action plan and a third-party citation gap analysis ranking the 10 sources most likely to move your AI visibility.
- [Content Restructuring](/services/content-restructuring): Converts existing website copy into answer-ready formats optimised for RAG systems and LLM extraction.
- [Schema Implementation](/services/schema-implementation): Deploys structured JSON-LD and entity markup to strengthen semantic trust and machine comprehension of your business.
- [AI Brand Presence](/services/ai-brand-presence): Builds consistent entity signals across the data sources used as grounding references by large language models.
- [Structured Content Systems](/services/structured-content-systems): Creates reusable publishing frameworks that produce machine-readable, high-utility pages at scale.
- [AI Visibility Strategy](/services/ai-visibility-strategy): Aligns your AEO optimisation roadmap with specific business revenue targets and priority market queries.

## Free Diagnostic Tool

- [AISearch Global AEO Score Calculator](/aeo-score-calculator): A free, instant AI visibility scorecard. Enter your website URL, industry, and location to receive a numeric score out of 100, a letter grade (A to F), an AI recommendation likelihood score, a plain-English interpretation, a highest-impact fix recommendation, and an industry benchmark comparison. Scores 20 signals — 17 structural AEO signals including title tag, meta description, H1, content depth, JSON-LD schema, FAQ content, About page, contact signals, review signals, location signals, industry keyword relevance, sitemap.xml, and robots.txt — plus 3 peer-reviewed Princeton GEO content signals (statistics, source citations, and quotations analysis based on peer-reviewed KDD 2024 study).

## Insights

- [What Is AEO? Answer Engine Optimisation Explained](/insights/what-is-aeo-answer-engine-optimisation): A foundational guide to Answer Engine Optimisation — what it is, how it differs from SEO, and why it matters for businesses as AI-generated answers replace traditional search results. Published 24 May 2026.
- [How AI Decides Which Businesses to Recommend](/insights/how-ai-decides-which-businesses-to-recommend): An explanation of the signals, data sources, and trust factors that determine whether an AI engine recommends your business in a response. Published 30 May 2026.
- [The AEO Traction Stack](/insights/aeo-traction-stack): AISearch Global's proprietary four-layer framework — Entity Clarity, Schema Markup, Answer-Format Content, Citation Consistency — for building durable AI search visibility. Published 7 Jun 2026.
- [Princeton GEO Paper Explained](/insights/princeton-geo-paper-explained): A plain-English breakdown of the peer-reviewed Princeton/Georgia Tech KDD 2024 study on Generative Engine Optimisation and what it means for Australian businesses. Published 14 Jun 2026.
- [AISearch Global: Client Zero — From 19 to 91, and What AI Still Doesn't Know](/insights/aisearch-global-client-zero): How AISearch Global used its own brand as Client Zero — tracking a structural AEO score climb from 19 to 91 in six weeks while measuring what ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini actually say about the brand today. Includes a link to the interactive AI Visibility Console. Published 21 Jun 2026.

## The Answer Engine — Daily AI News

- [The Answer Engine](/news): AISearch Global's daily AI news publication. Each edition covers AI news, AI law and regulation, human-AI research, and AEO-relevant developments, with an Australian focus. A new edition is published every day; each edition is archived at a dated URL (/news/YYYY-MM-DD) with every story linking back to its original source. RSS feed at /news/rss.xml.

## Interactive Tools

- [Client Zero AI Visibility Console](/insights/client-zero-visibility-dashboard): Interactive dashboard presenting AISearch Global's full AI Visibility Audit across 11 scored metrics — AEO Score, Brand Recognition, Share of Voice, Brand Sentiment, Presence Quality, GEO Visibility, Narrative Themes, Source Analysis, Site Performance, Technical Foundation, and Analysis Summary. Scored independently by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini. Data as of 20 Jun 2026. Living case study and product demonstration.

## Free Tools & Resources

- [AEO Tools & Resources](/resources/): Hub page linking to all free AISearch Global resources — the AEO Score Calculator, AEO Glossary, and The AI Search Dictionary.
- [The AI Search Dictionary: AEO, GEO & AI Visibility Terms Explained in Plain English](https://a.co/d/0fvTsI4V): Book by Viveka Mohan Das. 368 key terms across AEO, GEO, AI visibility, entity optimisation, structured data, prompt testing, and citation share — explained in plain language. Includes a bonus 80/20 AI visibility checklist and action templates for small business. Available on Amazon (ASIN B0H69QZ9RZ).

## Reference Pages

- [FAQ — 51 AEO Questions Answered](/faq): 51 frequently asked questions about Answer Engine Optimisation, AI search visibility, schema markup, and working with AISearch Global.
- [AI Visibility Audit](/#contact): Book the paid AI Visibility Audit via the homepage contact form. This is the entry point for the service.
- [About AISearch Global](/about/): Background on the agency, founder, and approach to AEO and GEO.

## Corporate Identity

- Business type: Specialist AEO and GEO consultancy
- Location: Sydney, New South Wales, Australia
- Market focus: Australian businesses seeking AI search visibility
- Contact: hello@aisearch.global
